topic: My smartwatch records a second heartbeat lying next to mine every night.
title: My Smartwatch Records A Second Heartbeat In My Bed | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My smartwatch records a second heartbeat beside mine every night.
scenes.image_prompt: a smartwatch on a nightstand glowing with a heart rate graph, dark bedroom, deep shadow, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I live alone and I always sleep on the left side.
scenes.image_prompt: a wide empty bed with one rumpled side, faint window light, low light, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The sleep graph showed two rhythms every night.
scenes.image_prompt: a phone screen displaying two overlapping heartbeat lines, blue glow in a dark room, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The second one was slower, calmer than mine.
scenes.image_prompt: a close view of a watch face showing a low pulse number, dim light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: At first I blamed a faulty sensor.
scenes.image_prompt: hands turning over a smartwatch in dim lamp light, exposed sensor on the back, low light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: But the second heartbeat came from the right side of the bed.
scenes.image_prompt: an empty pillow with a faint body-shaped dent, dark bedroom, fog, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I put the watch on the empty pillow to test it.
scenes.image_prompt: a smartwatch resting alone on a white pillow, faint glow, dark room, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It still read a heartbeat. Strong and steady.
scenes.image_prompt: a watch on a pillow showing an active pulse reading, eerie blue glow, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The second rhythm started speeding up to match my fear.
scenes.image_prompt: a phone graph with two heart lines climbing together, tense red glow, dark room, fog, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last night both heartbeats stopped at the exact same second.
scenes.image_prompt: a watch face showing a flat heart rate line, dim bedroom, deep shadow, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I woke gasping, alive, the sheets cold beside me.
scenes.image_prompt: a tangled cold side of a bed in grey dawn light, faint mist, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The watch still records that second heartbeat, even when I take it off.
scenes.image_prompt: a smartwatch left on an empty nightstand glowing with a pulse graph, dark room, fog, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing
